blended.narrative: Teton Pass Ski Area is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,316 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 47 mph may cause lift holds.

Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 7" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: light drizzle, highs of 43°F, gusts to 43 mph.
Tuesday: overcast, highs of 52°F, gusts to 66 mph.
Sunday: clear skies, highs of 56°F, gusts to 57 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 30".
